name: skala-agent-skills
description: A personal collection of agent skills for infrastructure and development workflows

plugins.name: terraform-conventions
plugins.description: Write and review Terraform HCL following HashiCorp's official style conventions, with file organization, naming, security, and module best practices

plugins.name: dockerfile-builder
plugins.description: Generate optimized, secure multi-stage Dockerfiles with modern BuildKit features, language-specific patterns, and container security best practices

plugins.name: github-issue-tracker
plugins.description: Track edge cases, TODOs, and deferred work as GitHub issues using the gh CLI, with duplicate detection, TODO file processing, and proactive suggestions

plugins.name: claude-md-auditor
plugins.description: Audit and improve CLAUDE.md files with quality scoring, targeted updates, and modern Claude Code feature recommendations
